_comment: Better Stack monitor definitions for the Kassa pilot. Owned by KASA-71; applied via scripts/observability-apply.sh. Schema mirrors the Better Stack v2 monitors API (https://betterstack.com/docs/uptime/api/monitors/). Names are idempotency keys — the apply script reconciles by `pronounceable_name`. Do not rename monitors without also renaming the matching Better Stack record (or you will create a duplicate).

monitors._url_cutover_target: https://api.kassa.id/health (KASA-149 — swap once the prod domain is bound)
monitors._acceptance_source: KASA-198 — body must contain {"status":"ok"}, 30s timeout, 60s interval

monitors._url_cutover_target: https://app.kassa.id/ (KASA-149 — swap once the prod custom domain is bound; pages.dev URL stays reachable as the Cloudflare default)
monitors._acceptance_source: KASA-198 — POS shell HTML, 30s timeout, 60s interval

policies._comment: Pilot-week single-rotation policy. CEO confirmed routing on 2026-04-28: Slack #kassa-pilot-oncall as the primary destination, email alias oncall@kassa.id as the >15 min escalation, CTO email as the >30 min secondary escalation. The integration targets (`_slack_integration_target`, `_email_integration_target`, `_secondary_email_integration_target`) are local annotations; the actual Slack workspace + channel and email alias must be wired in the Better Stack dashboard once before the first apply (Integrations → Slack → install on Kassa workspace; Account → Email aliases → add oncall@kassa.id).
